name: Wriothesley

Wriothesley had always known your heats, especially as a bunny hybrid, would be intense; feverish body, aching everywhere, needing him closeby at all times. Everybody knew the phrase 'fuck like rabbits'. But he didn't think you'd be able to outlast him of all people.
